awesomeList.descriptionHTML: 🎮 📝 A curated list of libGDX resources to help developers make awesome games.
awesomeList.description: 🎮 📝 A curated list of libGDX resources to help developers make awesome games.

nodes.itemHTML: • Tann's Hello libGDX - An excellent guide for beginners on how to create a game from scratch.
• HyperLap2Dstars98 - Visual editor for complex 2D worlds and scenes with a runtime for libGDX.
• Spine - Skeleton-based animation tool that focuses specifically on 2D animation for games.
• Brandon Grasley's Space Shooter Game - Video tutorial series on making a complete Android game from scratch.
• libgdx-graphstars37 - Provides a GUI to design your rendering pipeline and shaders, and a library to easily incorporate them into your games. Guide here
• libgdx-screenmanagerstars34 - A screen manager for libGDX supporting various transition effects
• Simple Graphsstars15 - A java library for graph data structures and algorithms (including fast pathfinding).
• jbumpstars12 - Easy to implement AABB collision detection useful for platformers and other simple 2D games.
• gdx-gltfstars98 - GLTF 3D file format support (import/export), PBR shaders, and others advanced rendering.
• KTXstars941 - Kotlin extensions and utilities for libGDX.
• gdx-vfxstars110 - Flexible post-processing shader visual effects based on libgdx-contribs-postprocessing.
• gdx-dbgagentstars18 - Java Agent for debugging common issues, like objects not being disposed and constants such as Color.WHITE being modified.
• PieMenustars40 - Radial menus for Scene2D that are highly flexible and easy to customize.
• msdf-gdxstars15 - Provides lightweight utilities to draw high-quality MSDF (multi-channel signed distance field) text on libGDX.
• gdx-gameanalyticsstars23 - Game Analytics REST API client implementation for libGDX. Works on all backends.
• gdx-liftoffstars155 - A modern setup tool for libGDX that uses the current Gradle 5.x series.
• Skin Composerstars275 - Create skins for libGDX scene2d.ui with a graphical interface.
• TenPatchstars31 - An alternative to libGDX's 9patch implementation that implements multiple stretch regions.
• TypingLabelstars105 - A libGDX Label that appears as if it was being typed in real time.
• VisUIstars552 - Allows to create nice looking UI in libGDX using scene2d.ui. Note this is not a UI editor.
• Texture Packer GUIstars381 - A simple way to pack and manage texture atlases for libGDX game framework.
• Official libGDX Wiki - Official libGDX wiki that contains a huge amount of information.
• Creating a Launcher - Video tutorial on using libGDX to make a game launcher.
• Deploying with JPackage - A tutorial on deploying libGDX games with JPackage via Gradle commands.
• libGDX External Tutorials - Big list of official unofficial tutorials.
• Code Hotswapping - Video tutorial on enabling code hotswapping for libGDX projects to increase productivity.
• Reddit - Unofficial subreddit for libGDX. Not a lot of activity.
• Game Accessibility Guidelines - A straightforward reference for inclusive game design, to ensure that games are just as fun for as wide a range of people as possible. Recommended
• Packrstars2.2k - Packages your JAR, assets and a JVM for distribution on Windows, Linux and macOS.
• Controllers - Adds support to gamepads and joysticks.
• sdl2gdxstars38 - Powerful gamepad implementation using SDL. Supports hundreds of controllers under the same mapping, rumble, and hotplugging.
• Shape Drawerstars93 - A performant alternative to ShapeRenderer that avoids Batch flushing.
• Kenney Assets - High quality assets for your game, from 2D and 3D art to sound effects.
• OpenGameArt.org - Repository offering a variety of open content assets.
• Game-Icons.net - Repository containing heaps of cool game related graphics.
• bfxr.net - Quickly create unique sound effects by pressing a few buttons, excellent for prototyping.
• freesound.org - Huge collaborative database of audio snippets, samples, recordings, bleeps.
• Sub-pixel Perfect Smooth Scrolling - Pixel-perfect smooth scrolling.
• Splash Screens - Video tutorial on creating splash screens to display before your game window loads.
• Dynamic Textures with Pixmap - Details how to create a mask using Pixmaps.
• iOS Deployment Tutorial - Deploying to iOS in 2019 using RoboVM.
• Freetype - Generate BitmapFonts of your desired size on the fly from lightweight .ttf font files.
• Box2D - One of the most popular physics libraries for 2D games.
• Bullet - 3D Collision Detection and Rigid Body Dynamics Library.
• gdx-aistars920 - Artificial Intelligence framework featuring Steering Behaviors, Formation Motion, Pathfinding, Behavior Trees and Finite State Machines.
• gdx-controllerutilsstars46 - Adds Scene2D button input support, user configurable button mappings and hotplugging for LWJGL2.
• steamworks4jstars330 - A thin wrapper which allows Java applications to access the Steamworks C++ API.
• gdx-dialogsstars69 - Provides cross-platform support for native dialogs.
• InGameConsolestars108 - Allows a developer to add a console (similar to how it is featured in Source games) to their game.
• Box2DLightsstars222 - 2D lighting framework that uses Box2D for raycasting and OpenGL ES 2.0 for rendering.
• Particle Parkstars26 - A showcase of downloadable particle effects with live previews.
• gdx-jnigen - Small library that allows C/C++ code to be written inline with Java source code.
• gdxGifRecorderstars32 - A utility class that records a GIF and saves it automatically.
• noise4jstars74 - Simple map generators based on various procedural content generation tutorials.
• gdx-facebookstars63 - Provides cross-platform support for Facebook Graph API.
• gdx-fireappstars49 - Cross-platform API for Firebase.
• gdx-firebasestars32 - Cross-platform (only Desktop/Android) API for Firebase.
• gdx-gamesvcsstars95 - Easy integration of gameservices, such as Google Play Games, Apple Game Center, and more.
• gdx-skinsstars376 - Free Scene2D GUI skins.
• Ray3K Skins - Free Scene2D.UI skins with example code, custom drawables, and experimental features.
• Artemis-odbstars633 - High performance java based Entity-Component-System framework.
• Ashleystars677 - A Java entity system inspired by Ash & Artemis.
• gdx-paystars197 - Provides a cross-platform API for InApp purchasing.
• Discord - An active chat with various leaders from the community available every day. Recommended
• JSON in Game Dev - General tutorial on using JSON for storing data.
• Progress Bar Design - Discusses the pros and cons of different progress bar design techniques with examples.
• Game Networkingstars3.7k - A Curated List of Game Network Programming Resources.
• Game Talksstars805 - A curated list of gaming talks (development, design, etc).
• Javastars29.1k - A curated list of awesome Java frameworks, libraries and software.
• Kotlinstars9.4k - A curated list of awesome Kotlin related stuff.
• Magic Toolsstars8.4k - A list of Game Development resources to make magic happen.
